# DryUI

> Zero-dependency Svelte 5 core (`@dryui/primitives` + `@dryui/ui`), a project-aware CLI, and an MCP server for scope-driven discovery and path-driven validation. Optional add-ons (`@dryui/theme-wizard`, `@dryui/feedback`) declare `lucide-svelte` as a peer dependency for icons.

## Start here

- Getting started: https://dryui.dev/getting-started
- Current overview and AI surface: https://dryui.dev/llms.txt
- Full component reference: https://dryui.dev/llms-components.txt

## Packages

- `@dryui/ui`: Styled components with CSS variables and theme system
- `@dryui/primitives`: Headless, unstyled building blocks
- `@dryui/cli`: CLI for setup, detect, install, add, lookup, compose, review, diagnose, doctor, and lint
- `@dryui/mcp`: MCP server with collapsed `ask` and `check` tools

## Installation

```bash
bun add @dryui/ui
```

## Theme setup

```html
<link rel="stylesheet" href="@dryui/ui/themes/default.css" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="@dryui/ui/themes/dark.css" />
```

```html
<html class="theme-auto" />
```

Use `data-theme="light"` or `data-theme="dark"` only for explicit overrides.

## CLI

The CLI is the default entry point for working with DryUI.

```bash
bun install -g @dryui/cli@latest
dryui
```

Current command surface:

- `setup`
- `init`
- `detect`
- `install`
- `add`
- `get`
- `info`
- `list`
- `compose`
- `review`
- `diagnose`
- `doctor`
- `lint`

## Editor integration

Per-tool install snippets and MCP config for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Windsurf, Copilot, and Zed live at https://dryui.dev/getting-started. Canonical source: `apps/docs/src/lib/ai-setup.ts` — do not duplicate snippets here.

Manual MCP fallback: `npx -y @dryui/mcp`.

## MCP tools

- `ask`: Discover components, recipes, setup guidance, and tokens through an explicit scope
- `check`: Validate a component, theme file, directory, or workspace through one unified path-driven tool

## Authoritative references

The generated references below are the source of truth for the current component inventory, props, imports, and AI integration surface:

- https://dryui.dev/llms.txt
- https://dryui.dev/llms-components.txt
